name: Sweet & Simple Honey Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine flour, sugar, mustard powder, and turmeric. Stir in water. Let stand for 2 hours.
2. Combine the mustard mixture, honey, and vinegar in the top of a double boiler. Cook, whisking often, over boiling water until the mixture just begins to thicken, about 3 minutes. Continue cooking for an additional 2 minutes, whisking constantly, until slightly thickened (the mixture will thicken completely on standing). Transfer to a clean storage jar. Cover and refrigerate at least overnight or up to 1 month.
MUSTARD PICKLE RELISH: Combine 1/2 cup finely chopped dill pickles and 1/4 cup Sweet & Simple Honey Mustard in a small bowl. Makes about 3/4 cup relish.
